description: Implementation passes code_quality_review on the first round (5 reviewers all OK, aggregator decision=pass). Engine should advance to final_verification. Post-F-011/H10-3 (D-003 dropped), reviewers stage their note diffs and the aggregate commit folds them in — so this scenario adds exactly 1 commit on top of the seeded init+setup pair.

round-1.summary: DA-1: no security or design holes spotted
round-1.note_section:
## code_quality_review.devils_advocate_1 (round 1)

- [x] Security: input validation present
- [x] Logic: edge cases covered (zero, negative, overflow)
- [x] Authorization: N/A for this calc tool

**Verdict**: No Critical/Major concerns.

round-1.summary: DA-2: implementation matches plan, no surprises
round-1.note_section:
## code_quality_review.devils_advocate_2 (round 1)

- [x] Scope: no scope creep
- [x] Risk: no new risks introduced

**Verdict**: No Critical/Major concerns.

## code_quality_review.code_reviewer_1 (round 1)

- [x] Code quality: idiomatic, readable
- [x] Tests: AC items covered

**Verdict**: No Critical/Major concerns.

## code_quality_review.code_reviewer_2 (round 1)

**Verdict**: No Critical/Major concerns.

## code_quality_review.aggregate (round 1)

**Decision**: pass

All 5 reviewers reported No Critical/Major. Advancing to final_verification.

guardian_output.summary: All 5 reviewers passed with no Critical/Major findings
guardian_output.reasoning: DA-1 + DA-2 + CR-1 + CR-2 + Critical-1 all returned No Critical/Major in round 1. Implementation matches plan, AC items are covered with evidence, no regressions, no security or authorization concerns. Ready to advance to final_verification.
